def: Having, or consisting of, ten syllables.
Dementia; loss of mental powers. See Insanity.
Soft; tender; delicate. [Obs. or Prov. Eng.]
Trembling or vaccilating, as if about to fall; unsteady;shaking. Johnson.
One of the Gastropoda. [Written also gasteropod.]
A tropical humming bird of the genus Lophornis, with veryelegant neck plumes. Several species are known. See Illustrationunder Spangle, v. t.
A roundabout or indirect course; indirectness. [Obs.] S.Richardson.
